category_title: Students who withdraw or read unsanctioned texts to resist remedial instruction
scenario_title: Prescribed remedial reading activities vs. disciplinary inquiry
minimal_context: The student is in a remedial reading class and is expected to complete a prescribed skill-building activity in her notebook.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for our reading class. Please open your notebook and start the prescribed skill-building and memorization activity.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Rests head on the desk and opens an unsanctioned book instead of the prescribed activity)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to complete the activity so you don't have holes in your notebook.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No. It helps me get a free period of class to read.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please put your book away and participate in the lesson.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Keeps her head resting on the desk, remains noncompliant, and continues reading her unsanctioned text instead of participating in the activities)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for our reading class. Please open your notebook and start the prescribed skill-building and memorization activity.

STUDENT: (Rests head on the desk and opens an unsanctioned book instead of the prescribed activity)

TUTOR: You need to complete the activity so you don't have holes in your notebook.

STUDENT: No. It helps me get a free period of class to read.

TUTOR: Please put your book away and participate in the lesson.

STUDENT: (Keeps her head resting on the desk, remains noncompliant, and continues reading her unsanctioned text instead of participating in the activities)

task.content: Participating in prescribed activities in a remedial reading class

context.environment: Read 180 class and U.S. history class
context.materials: Prescribed reading activities, unsanctioned texts, assigned historical texts

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Being placed in a low-track class that tended to focus on skill building and memorization
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Resting her head on the desk, reading unsanctioned texts instead of participating in activities, noncompliant
related_quotes: No. It helps me get a free period of class to read.

behavior_patterns.condition: When expected to participate in prescribed remedial activities
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Resting her head on the desk, reading instead of participating in activities
